name: IAM Server Certificates Not Expired
description: Expired SSL/TLS server certificates stored in IAM should be removed as they can no longer be used and indicate poor certificate lifecycle management
remediation: Remove expired server certificates from IAM. Use: aws iam delete-server-certificate --server-certificate-name <name>
remediation_steps: List all server certificates: aws iam list-server-certificates
Identify expired certificates by checking the Expiration date
Delete expired certificates: aws iam delete-server-certificate --server-certificate-name <name>
Update any services still referencing the old certificate to use a valid one
